hero.title: Your university schedule, always in sync
hero.subtitle: Generate a personal calendar link in 30 seconds. Add it to Apple Calendar or Google Calendar — your schedule updates automatically, forever.
hero.noAccount: No account required · Free · Works with any calendar app

howItWorks.title: From timetable to your calendar in 3 steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Find your degree programme, choose the academic year, curriculum and the specific subjects you attend
howItWorks.step2Desc: We generate a unique .ics subscription link just for you
howItWorks.step3Desc: Add the link to Apple Calendar, Google Calendar or Outlook — that's it. Updates happen automatically

features.title: Everything your schedule deserves
features.subtitle: Built to manage students' time in the best way
features.autoUpdateDesc: Your calendar always reflects the latest timetable from UniBo
features.filterDesc: Choose exactly which subjects and class groups to include. No clutter
features.multiCourseDesc: Combine subjects from multiple degrees or years into a single calendar link
features.anyCalendarDesc: Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook, Thunderbird — anything that supports .ics
features.noAccountDesc: Generate a calendar link instantly, no sign-up needed. Create an account only if you want more control

cta.title: Ready to sync your schedule?
cta.subtitle: Takes 30 seconds. No account required
cta.signInLink: Or sign in for advanced features

footer.madeFor: Made for students of University of Bologna

auth.title: Sign in to UniPlanner
auth.agree: By signing in you agree to

error.title: Authentication failed
error.server: Something went wrong. Please try again

create.findDegree: Find your degree programme to get started
create.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, e.g. "Computer Science" or "Medicina"
create.noCurricula: No curricula available for this course.
create.ttlWarning: Your link stays active as long as your calendar use it.

created.title: Calendar created
created.howToApple: Click the Apple Calendar button above. Or open Apple Calendar › File › New Calendar Subscription and paste the link.
created.howToGoogle: Click the Google Calendar button above. Or go to Google Calendar › Settings › Add calendar › From URL and paste the link.
created.howToOutlook: Go to Outlook › Add calendar › Subscribe from web and paste the link.
created.signInPrompt: Sign in to manage this calendar in the future
created.claimText: This calendar was created anonymously. Claim it to manage it from your dashboard.
created.promoText: Want your own calendar? Create one in 30 seconds.

dashboard.showingCalendars: Showing {count, plural, one {# calendar} other {# calendars}}
dashboard.emptyDesc: Create your first calendar to start syncing your UniBo schedule.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences
settings.profileInfoDesc: Manage your account settings and preferences
settings.emailHint: Email is tied to your OAuth provider and cannot be changed here
settings.dangerDesc: Irreversible actions that affect your account
settings.logoutAllDesc: Sign out from all devices where you're currently logged in
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account. Your calendars will become anonymous.
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone. Your calendars will become anonymous.

errors.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist
errors.expiredDesc: The owner hasn't used this calendar in a while
errors.serverErrorDesc: We're working on fixing it. Please try again later
errors.accessDeniedDesc: You don't have access to this calendar
errors.calendarNotFoundDesc: This calendar doesn't exist or has been deleted

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: UniPlanner ("we", "us", "our") operates the website uniplanner.it. This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our service.
privacy.accountEmail: Email address — provided by Google or Apple during sign-in
privacy.accountName: Display name — provided by Google or Apple during sign-in
privacy.accountPicture: Profile picture URL — provided by Google during sign-in
privacy.accountAvatar: Avatar — profile photo from your Google account
privacy.accountNoPassword: We do not store your Google or Apple passwords.
privacy.calendarCourses: Course selections — which courses, curricula, and subjects you choose
privacy.calendarLinks: Calendar links — the .ics subscription links you generate
privacy.usageIp: IP address — hashed (SHA-256) for subscription analytics, not stored in raw form
privacy.usageAgent: User agent — browser/calendar app identifier, used for subscription tracking
privacy.usageTimestamps: Access timestamps — when calendar links are accessed
privacy.use1: To provide calendar generation and synchronization functionality
privacy.use2: To maintain your account and calendar preferences
privacy.use3: To track calendar link usage for TTL management
privacy.storageText: All data is stored on our servers in the European Union. We use encryption in transit (HTTPS) and at rest.
privacy.thirdPartyGoogle: Google OAuth — for authentication only. We receive your email and name
privacy.thirdPartyApple: Apple Sign In — for authentication only. We receive your email and name
privacy.thirdPartyCloudflare: Cloudflare — for CDN and DDoS protection
privacy.thirdPartyNoSell: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal data to third parties.
privacy.gdprText: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, export, and object to processing of your personal data. Account deletion removes all personal data. Calendar links become anonymous.
privacy.cookiesText: We use only essential cookies: authentication tokens, theme preference, and language preference. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of UniPlanner (uniplanner.it). By using the service, you agree to these terms.
terms.whatText: UniPlanner is a free tool that generates .ics calendar subscription links from University of Bologna timetable data. It is a student project, not an official university service.
terms.warrantyIntro: UniPlanner is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee:
terms.warranty1: Accuracy of timetable data (sourced from UniBo's public systems)
terms.warranty3: That calendar updates will happen within any specific timeframe
terms.warrantyOutro: Always verify your schedule against official university sources.
terms.resp1: You are responsible for the accuracy of your course and subject selections
terms.resp2: Do not attempt to abuse, overload, or interfere with the service
terms.resp3: Do not use automated tools to scrape or mass-access the service beyond normal usage
terms.accounts1: Accounts are created via Google or Apple sign-in
terms.accounts2: You may delete your account at any time from account settings
terms.accounts3: We may suspend accounts that violate these terms
terms.calLinks1: Anonymous calendar links expire after 30 days of inactivity
terms.calLinks2: Authenticated calendar links expire after 1 year of inactivity
terms.calLinks3: Expired links become inaccessible but are not permanently deleted
terms.calLinks4: Links are automatically extended when accessed within the expiry window
terms.ip2: Timetable data belongs to the University of Bologna
terms.ip3: UniPlanner does not claim ownership of any university data
terms.liabilityText: To the maximum extent permitted by law, UniPlanner and its contributors shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the service, including but not limited to missed classes, incorrect schedules, or data loss.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.terminationText: We reserve the right to terminate or restrict access to the service at any time, for any reason, without notice.
terms.lawText: These terms are governed by the laws of Italy.
